description: A designed graphic showing a booking-style portrait of a man with short dark hair. Across the lower portion, white text on a red bar reads 'Illegal Alien With 25+ Priors' and beneath it 'Kidnapped/Attempted To Rape Woman in Arlington, VA'. A White House wordmark is at the bottom.
notable_text: Illegal Alien With 25+ Priors; Kidnapped/Attempted To Rape Woman in Arlington, VA; The WHITE HOUSE
